description: Climate change, emissions, conservation, biodiversity, ecology, and environmental policy. Renewable power generation and energy markets go to Energy.
embeddings: Global average temperatures rise as climate change accelerates the warming trend
Carbon emissions and greenhouse gases reach record levels worldwide
United Nations COP climate summit negotiates emissions reduction targets
Nations pledge net-zero carbon targets to limit long-term global warming
Melting glaciers and polar ice caps accelerate global sea level rise
Deforestation of the Amazon rainforest threatens biodiversity and habitats
Endangered species conservation efforts work to prevent wildlife extinction
Ocean acidification and coral reef bleaching harm marine ecosystems
Air pollution and smog reach hazardous levels across major cities
Plastic pollution and ocean waste threaten marine life and coastlines
Climate scientists warn of dangerous tipping points on a warming planet
Prolonged extreme heat waves are linked to human-caused climate change
Environmental activists stage protests demanding stronger climate action
Government introduces a carbon tax and emissions trading policy
Biodiversity loss accelerates as ecosystems collapse under human pressure
Reforestation and tree-planting initiative aims to capture atmospheric carbon
Water scarcity and worsening drought are tied to a changing climate
Environmental regulation restricts industrial pollution and toxic waste
Rewilding and habitat restoration project revives a degraded ecosystem
Corporate greenwashing accusations over hollow climate commitments
Permafrost thaw releases methane further accelerating global warming
Climate refugees are displaced by rising seas and spreading desertification
Peer-reviewed climate science study projects future warming using new atmospheric models
Sustainable farming practices reduce agriculture's environmental footprint
Investors divest from fossil fuels over long-term climate risk
Clean air legislation targets vehicle and factory pollution emissions
Wetlands and old-growth forests protected under a new conservation law
Climate lawsuit seeks to hold polluters accountable for their emissions
Global warming breaks temperature records for the hottest year measured
Scientific report warns of an accelerating mass extinction and biodiversity crisis
